channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: No. 6 Ohio State routs top-ranked Oregon 41-21 in the Rose Bowl, advances to CFP semifinals
item.description: Jeremiah Smith caught two of Will Howard’s three long touchdown passes during Ohio State’s sensational 34-point first half, and the No. 6 Buckeyes roared into the College Football Playoff semifinals with a 41-21 victory over No. 1 Oregon in the 111th Rose Bowl Game on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Pelicans' minds on New Orleans after deadly attack as they prepared to play in Miami
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Willie Green got the text from his father early Wednesday. The first part wished him Happy New Year. The second offered prayers for New Orleans. That's how the coach of the Pelicans found out about the horror happening in his city. “I'm devastated,” Green said.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Sugar Bowl announces new start time after postponement amid New Orleans attack
item.description: The Allstate Sugar Bowl announced that the game will start at 4 p.m. ET on Thursday after Wednesday's deadly attack in New Orleans.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Texas survives double OT scare from Arizona State in college football playoff thriller
item.description: Texas defensive back Andrew Mukuba hauled in an interception to clinch a college football playoff win after a shocking effort from underdog Arizona State.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: White Sox trade for left-handed reliever from Phillies
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago White Sox traded for a left-handed reliever from the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for a minor league prospect. In exchange for minor-league right-hander Aaron Combs, the White Sox acquired 31-year-old left-handed pitcher Tyler Gilbert from the Phillies.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Gauff and Fritz put US in United Cup semifinals. Kazakhstan beats Germany to advance
item.description: PERTH, Australia (AP) — Coco Gauff and Taylor Fritz powered the U.S., tournament winner two years ago, into the semifinals of the United Cup mixed teams tennis event on Wednesday. In the first singles match, Gauff had a 7-6 (4), 6-2 win over China's Zhang Shuai.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sugar Bowl CFP quarterfinal between Georgia and Notre Dame postponed after deadly truck attack
item.description: The College Football Playoff quarterfinal in New Orleans has been postponed a day after a truck plowed into a New Year’s crowd about a mile away from the site of the Sugar Bowl between Georgia and Notre Dame.
item.dc:creator: Brett Martel, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Eagles head coach Nick Sirianni says he'll meet with staff, players about Saquon Barkley's chase for record
item.description: The Philadelphia Eagles have nothing to play for, but Saquon Barkley is 101 yards away from breaking Eric Dickerson's single-season rushing record.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: US beats Canada 4-1 to finish first in its group at world junior championship
item.description: OTTAWA, Ontario (AP) — Danny Nelson scored the eventual game-winner in the third period and Trey Augustine made 38 saves, leading the United States to a 4-1 win over Canada on Tuesday night and into the top spot in Group A at the world junior hockey championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rangers putting goalie Igor Shesterkin on IR with an upper body injury, AP source says
item.description: New York Rangers goaltender Igor Shesterkin is going on injured reserve, according to a person with knowledge of the decision. The person spoke to The Associated Press on condition of anonymity Tuesday because the moved had not been announced. The person said Shesterkin has an upper-body injury.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lamar Jackson vs Josh Allen MVP debate divides NFL media
item.description: The NFL MVP race between Buffalo Bills quarterback Josh Allen and Baltimore Ravens quarterback Lamar Jackson is coming down to the final week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Westbrook's triple-double leads Denver past Utah
item.description: DENVER (AP) - Russell Westbrook became the second player in NBA history to have a triple-double with zero turnovers and shoot 100% from the field and the free-throw line in the Denver Nuggets' 132-121 win over the Utah Jazz on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Holiday Classic: Lincoln Stockton 64, Mission Bay 45
item.description: In the American Bracket Championship Game of the 2024 Holiday Classic, Lincoln High School from Stockton, CA defeated Mission Bay 64-45.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Ruben Amorim is 'very excited' about where 14th-place Man United can go in 2025
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Despite his team entering 2025 in 14th place in the Premier League, Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim is “very excited” about the year ahead.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Michigan defense pressures Milroe all day, Wolverines beat No. 11 Alabama 19-13 in ReliaQuest Bowl
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — A year removed from winning the national championship, Michigan finished its first season under Sherrone Moore with a victory setting the tone for a bright future. Moore replaced Jim Harbaugh after the former Wolverines coach left for the NFL's Los Angeles Chargers last winter.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Coby White, Torrey Craig lead the Bulls past the Hornets in overtime, 115-108
item.description: Coby White narrowly missed his first career triple-double, finishing with 23 points, 10 rebounds and nine assists, and Torrey Craig scored 18 with five 3-pointers after halftime as the Chicago Bulls held on to beat the Charlotte Hornets 115-108 in overtime Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Darnold gives Vikings another gem with career-high 377 yards in 27-25 win over Packers
item.description: The Minnesota Vikings were ready to start their postgame ritual in honor of a ninth consecutive victory before realizing Sam Darnold was still missing from the raucous locker room because he was finishing his interview with the TV broadcasting crew.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: BYU crushes Colorado in Alamo Bowl, 36-14
item.description: SAN ANTONIO, Tex. (AP) - L.J. Martin rushed for 93 yards and two touchdowns, Jake Retzlaff passed for 151 yards, and No. 17 BYU beat 20th-ranked Colorado 36-14 in the Alamo Bowl on Saturday night. “Understanding that they have great players on the other side of the field," Martin said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Southern California overcomes 17-point deficit to beat Texas A&M 35-31 in Las Vegas Bowl
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — The Southern California Trojans ended their season the way they started it. On Sept. 1 at Allegiant Stadium in the opener, the Trojans overcame a third-quarter deficit and scored with eight seconds left to beat LSU 27-20.
item.dc:creator: W.G. RAMIREZ, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Shaq Barrett expected to re-sign with Bucs after being waived by Dolphins, reports say
item.description: Former Tampa Bay Buccaneers linebacker Shaq Barrett is expected to once again sign with the Bucs after he was waived by the Miami Dolphins, according to multiple reports.
item.dc:creator: Kevin Accettulla, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Column: The path of Matthew Stafford looms for Caleb Williams
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — A skilled quarterback burdened by the dysfunction of his organization, doomed to toil in mediocrity for over a decade despite a high level of performance year in and year out.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers agree to new deal with Teoscar Hernández: report
item.description: Los Angeles Dodgers fans will need to stock up on sunflower seeds after the team agreed to a new deal with fan favorite slugger Teoscar Hernández. Hernández will return to the Dodgers on a new 3-year, $66 million deal, according to ESPN's Jeff Passan.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Athletics president Dave Kaval will resign from organization in the coming days
item.description: (AP) -- Athletics president Dave Kaval will resign from the organization after being the public face of the organization's planned move from Oakland to Las Vegas. Kaval has been president of the A's for the past eight years and will step down from the role on Dec.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Bears vs Seahawks Preview: Inactives, Caleb Williams' development and a shot at the wrong kind of history
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — For the last time this season, the Chicago Bears will take to Soldier Field with a bit of dubious history on the line. The Bears (4-11) are losers of nine straight and will take on a Seattle Seahawks squad (8-7) who's playoff hopes dangle in the balance.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
